description_long: This is a standard traffic cone, predominantly orange with two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its upper section. The cone has a tall, tapering conical body that rises from a broad, square base, which provides stability and prevents tipping. The base is flat and slightly beveled at the edges, made from a thicker, heavier material than the cone itself. The surface of the cone shows some minor scuff marks and faint dirt lines, indicating light outdoor use. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, with no attachments or holes. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A tall orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, stable square base. The surface shows minor wear and no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and a square base, with minor scuff marks visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same features, with the reflective stripes and base clearly visible and no additional markings.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, showing the cone's smooth surface and the even distribution of the stripes.
description_view_3: Final view displaying the rounded tip and the broad, flat base, with consistent coloration and no visible logos.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper half of the cone, evenly spaced and of equal width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and wide, made of thicker rubber for stability, with slightly beveled edges and a smooth surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with minor scuff marks and faint dirt lines but no significant damage or fading.
